name: python3-fsapfs
title: python3-fsapfs
description:
APFS access library -- Python 3 bindings
libfsapfs is a library to access the Apple File System (APFS).
.
This package includes Python 3 bindings.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-fsapfs because APFS access library -- Python 3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-fsapfs as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-fsapfs with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-fsapfs --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
